pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly extracts the downloaded shapefile to this path.
task.json instructions and export_result.sh explicitly check for this output path.
Python shapefile analysis on the downloaded ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp shows the original 177 features explode into exactly 289 single-part polygons.
task.json and export_result.sh strictly check that the final geometry type is 'Polygon' rather than 'MultiPolygon'.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real Natural Earth 110m cultural countries shapefile (ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp), which is downloaded and extracted to /home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_110m_countries/. Analysis of the shapefile confirms that the initial 177 MultiPolygon features explode into exactly 289 single-part Polygon features, satisfying the >250 min_feature_count expectation. The verifier checks that the output is saved to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/countries_singlepart.geojson and that the resulting geometries are primarily 'Polygon' types.
